meta.regression_guard: Sync preview tool — must return `prompt` (filled template, ≤2000 chars) plus `approved` boolean reflecting Bible.approval_status. Tolerant of draft bibles: returns `approved:false` instead of throwing so the UI can warn (vs. generate_anchor which hard-gates). If `prompt` ever comes back empty for an approved Bible, the ✦ Auto-fill button silently writes blank into the textarea — UI cannot distinguish blank-because-no-template from blank-because-failure. `sources` array tells the UI which Bible fields fed the prompt; absence breaks provenance display.
